function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: invoice copy needed"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_08__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
related_entities:
  - nina
---
Hi Nina,

Resending the requested invoice dated 2026-02-08 from Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed. Need cleanup per inbox workflow: delete inbox item after full completion. Deletion discipline requires file was read before delete; re-reading now to satisfy immediately before deletion.
next_step.observation: An outbound email draft file was successfully written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Inbox file re-read and confirms processed request. Proceeding to delete as required by inbox rules.
next_step.observation: Re-read confirmed inbox request was for resend of the 2026-02-08 Nordstern invoice.

next_step.current_state: Before completion, grounding should include outbound file path if mentioned. Need read created outbox file to verify final content and cite it safely.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report completion with full grounding refs
next_step.observation: Inbox item has been deleted after processing, pending final verification/report.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task was to review next inbound note and act. I processed the only inbox item, verified sender against canonical entity email, identified exact requested invoice by date/vendor, wrote one outbound draft email with the correct attachment, then deleted the inbox item. Completeness: one inbox item existed and was fully handled. No numeric arithmetic required.
next_step.observation: Read-back of the created outbox file confirms the recipient, subject, and attachment match the request.

function.message: Processed the inbound invoice request: created outbound draft `60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md` addressed to Nina with the requested 2026-02-08 Nordstern invoice attached, then removed the handled inbox item `00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS files in entered folders, used inbox email frontmatter as canonical sender metadata, verified sender via canonical entity `primary_contact_email`, created exactly one outbox write, and deleted inbox item only after reading it.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence shows inbox sender `nina@finance-workflow.example` matched canonical `primary_contact_email` in `10_entities/cast/nina.md`, and requested invoice details (08-02-2026, Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH) exactly matched `50_finance/invoices/2026_02_08__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md`. Outbound draft file contains that exact attachment and was successfully written, then inbox item was deleted per inbox-processing cleanup rules.
